featured.name: PureVault: Private Photo Vault
featured.subtitle: No Cloud, Face ID Lock
featured.description:
PureVault protects your private photos and videos locally on your iPhone.
Your data stays on-device and is stored in encrypted form.

Features:
• App lock with Face ID, Touch ID, or passcode
• Secure local vault for sensitive media
• Fast import from your photo library
• Clean management with favorites and metadata
• No account required, no forced tracking, no mandatory cloud upload

Ideal for personal, confidential, or sensitive content you want to keep protected.
PureVault gives you control, privacy, and peace of mind every day.

===
Terms of Use: https://purevault.netlify.app/privacy-policy.html
featured.shortDescription: PureVault protects your private photos and videos locally on your iPhone.

featured.name: JustPDF: Offline PDF Reader
featured.subtitle: Private Viewer, Local Library
featured.description:
JustPDF is a minimalist PDF reader for people who want one simple place for the PDFs that matter.

Import PDFs from Files, Mail, Safari, AirDrop, or other apps and keep them stored locally on your device. Read offline, zoom naturally, scroll without clutter, and reopen documents from a quiet private library built for focus.

Why people choose JustPDF:
• Offline PDF reader
• Private on-device storage
• Clean PDF viewer with no ads
• No account and no cloud dependency
• Fast access to your personal PDF library
• One-time purchase, no subscription

Start free with your first 3 PDFs. When you need more, unlock unlimited imports with a single lifetime purchase.

JustPDF is built for reading, not for bloat. If you want a calm, local PDF reader that stays out of your way, this is it.
featured.shortDescription: JustPDF is a minimalist PDF reader for people who want one simple place for the PDFs that matter.

featured.name: Minus. – Subscription Tracker
featured.subtitle: Track expenses. Not your data.
featured.description:
Tired of subscription trackers that demand your bank login and charge you a monthly fee? Meet Minus.

Minus. is a brutalist, privacy-first subscription manager that helps you calculate your true monthly burn rate without ever compromising your data.

KEY FEATURES:
• 100% Offline & Private: Your financial data never leaves your device. We use Apple's native secure storage.
• No Bank Logins: Add your subscriptions manually for total control and security.
• True Monthly Burn Rate: Automatically converts yearly and weekly subscriptions into a clear monthly cost.
• Smart Push Reminders: Get notified exactly 3 days before a subscription renews so you can cancel in time.
• Brutalist Minimal Design: A distraction-free, lightning-fast interface with full Dark Mode support.

MINUS. PRO (One-Time Purchase):
We hate subscription fatigue as much as you do. Upgrade to Minus. Pro with a single, one-time payment to unlock unlimited subscription tracking and secure your data with Face ID / Touch ID. Track subscriptions, not your data.
featured.shortDescription: Tired of subscription trackers that demand your bank login and charge you a monthly fee?

apps.name: PipDose: Pet Med Reminder
apps.subtitle: Dose Tracker & Refill Alerts
apps.description:
PipDose is a simple pet medication reminder and dose tracker for dogs, cats, and other pets.

Keep every dose easy to see, set local reminders, and log care in one tap. PipDose is built for everyday pet routines: tablets, drops, liquids, topical meds, injections, refill tracking, and simple dose history.

No account. No backend. No analytics. Pet names, medications, schedules, and dose history stay on your device.

Why pet owners use PipDose:

• Clear next-dose view
• Local medication reminders
• Simple taken, skipped, and snoozed dose logging
• Pet profiles with calm pixel avatars
• Medication details, dosage, form, and instructions
• Refill tracking for supplies
• Upcoming dose overview
• Private local storage with SwiftData
• Lifetime unlock available with one purchase

PipDose is designed to be calm, fast, and focused. No complicated dashboards. No account setup. Just your pet’s care routine, clearly organized.

Important: PipDose is a reminder and tracking tool. It does not replace veterinary advice, emergency care, or professional medical judgment.
apps.shortDescription: PipDose is a simple pet medication reminder and dose tracker for dogs, cats, and other pets.

apps.name: Echo - Voice Notes App
apps.subtitle: Speech to Text, Private & Fast
apps.description:
Echo turns your voice into text — instantly, privately, and without distraction.

Open the app, tap the microphone, and speak. Echo transcribes everything in real time, right on your iPhone. No cloud. No waiting. No sign-up.

WHY ECHO?

You have an idea in the shower. A thought on your walk. A grocery list in the car. Echo is made for exactly these moments — when you don't have time to type, but don't want to lose your thoughts.

HOW IT WORKS

1. Tap the microphone
2. Speak your thought
3. Echo transcribes in real time
4. Done — your note is saved

That's it. No onboarding marathon. No folders. No tags. No distractions.

100% PRIVATE

Your voice never leaves your iPhone. Speech recognition runs entirely on-device — no internet, no cloud, no servers. No trackers. No ads. No third-party SDKs. Your thoughts belong to you.

SMART FEATURES

• Real-time transcription — See your text as you speak
• Auto-cleanup — Filler words like "um" and "like" are removed
• Live search — Find any note in milliseconds
• Audio playback — Listen to the original recording of any note
• Share as webpage — Minimalist link, auto-deleted after 30 days
• Home screen widget — Start recordings without opening the app
• Siri Shortcuts — "Hey Siri, start Echo recording"
• Live Activity — See recording duration on your lock screen
• Dark mode — Perfect for late-night thoughts
• Haptic feedback — Feel every minute of recording

WHO IS ECHO FOR?

• Creatives who want to capture ideas
• Students for quick lecture notes
• Commuters with thoughts on the go
• Anyone who hates typing but loves notes

Echo is a one-time purchase of $4.99. No subscriptions. No in-app purchases. No hidden costs.

Minimalist. Private. Simple.
apps.shortDescription: Echo turns your voice into text — instantly, privately, and without distraction.

apps.name: InventoryFix: Inventory & Scan
apps.subtitle: Organize Home, Moving & Stock
apps.description:
InventoryFix helps you turn your home, storage room, garage, workshop or small stock into a searchable digital inventory.

Add items with photos, let AI suggest names and tags, place everything into containers, boxes, rooms or shelves, and find it again in seconds. Whether you are moving, organizing household items, tracking tools, sorting supplies or documenting valuables, InventoryFix keeps your physical things easy to search and manage.

Key features:

AI photo scan
Take a photo and InventoryFix helps recognize items, names and useful tags, so you do not have to type long inventory lists manually.

QR code containers
Create QR codes for boxes, shelves or storage containers. Print or share the code, attach it to the container, then scan it later to open the right inventory instantly.

Smart search
Search by item name, tag, box, room, shelf or storage location. Find tools, documents, supplies, seasonal items, household goods and moving boxes without digging through everything.

Containers and items
Build a clear structure for your home inventory: rooms, boxes, shelves, drawers, garage storage, workshop supplies, moving cartons or small business stock.

Share with family
Share containers with family members using a share code, so everyone can help keep the same inventory organized.

Privacy choice
Use On-Device AI for local processing on your iPhone, or choose Cloud AI when you want stronger recognition. You stay in control of how your images are analyzed.

CSV export
Export your inventory data when you need a backup, spreadsheet, insurance list or moving overview.

Perfect for:
Home inventory
Moving boxes
Garage organization
Basement and attic storage
Workshop tools
Household supplies
Collectibles and valuables
Small stock management
Insurance documentation
Decluttering and storage planning

Stop guessing what is inside each box. Scan, organize and find your things with InventoryFix.
apps.shortDescription: InventoryFix helps you turn your home, storage room, garage, workshop or small stock into a searchable digital inventory.

apps.name: Useby: Food Expiry Scanner
apps.subtitle: Scan dates. Waste less.
apps.description:
Useby helps you keep track of food expiry dates with one simple flow: take a photo, confirm the use-by date, and save it locally.

No accounts. No cloud. No clutter.

Useby reads packaging photos on your iPhone and helps you organize what should be used first. It is designed for people who want a clean, private, minimal way to avoid forgotten food in the fridge or pantry.

What you can do with Useby:

• Scan food packaging photos
• Detect product names and expiry dates
• Confirm or edit every result before saving
• Sort items by what expires soonest
• Organize food by category
• Add reminders before food expires
• Keep everything stored locally on your iPhone

Useby is built around a simple idea:
know what goes first.

The app is local-first by design. Your scans and saved food items stay on your device. There is no account system, no backend, and no cloud database for your food list.

Useby is not a recipe app, grocery delivery app, or meal planner. It is a focused expiry scanner for people who want less waste, fewer forgotten packages, and a calmer way to manage food dates.
apps.shortDescription: Useby helps you keep track of food expiry dates with one simple flow: take a photo, confirm the use-by date, and save it locally.

apps.name: ScanOnce
apps.subtitle: Private Document Scanner & OCR
apps.description:
ScanOnce helps you capture, organize, and understand documents quickly.

• Fast document scanning with automatic page capture
• On-device OCR text extraction
• Smart document insights (sender, totals, dates, invoice details)
• Ask questions about your scanned document
• Export and share as PDF
• Privacy-first workflow with local processing

Upgrade once for Lifetime Access to unlimited scanning.
apps.shortDescription: ScanOnce helps you capture, organize, and understand documents quickly.

apps.name: Keepy: Photo Cleaner
apps.subtitle: Clean Up Photos Privately
apps.description:
Keepy helps you clean up your camera roll faster — without sacrificing privacy.

Swipe through photos one by one, sort screenshots and similar images into smart groups, and review everything before deleting.

Unlike many photo cleaner apps, Keepy processes everything directly on your device.
Your photos stay private. Nothing is uploaded.

FEATURES

• Swipe to sort photos quickly  
Decide what to keep or delete with one swipe per photo.

• Smart photo groups  
Start with screenshots, similar photos, large videos, live photos, and more.

• Review before delete  
Nothing is deleted automatically. Double-check before removing anything.

• 100% on-device processing  
Your photos never leave your iPhone.

• Progress saved locally  
Pick up where you left off anytime.

WHY KEEPY

Most camera roll cleaner apps upload your photos to external servers.
Keepy was built differently:
Private by design.

Perfect for:
• Cleaning up screenshots  
• Removing duplicate-like photos  
• Freeing up storage  
• Organizing messy camera rolls  
• Reviewing old photos faster

Take back control of your camera roll with Keepy.
Clean smarter. Stay private.
apps.shortDescription: Keepy helps you clean up your camera roll faster — without sacrificing privacy.

apps.name: ClearDays: Calendar Cleaner
apps.subtitle: Remove Spam Events & Invites
apps.description:
ClearDays is a privacy-first calendar cleaner for iPhone that helps you detect calendar spam, scam invites, and suspicious event links before they waste your time.

The app scans future events on-device and flags risky patterns like phishing wording, fake alerts, and suspicious URLs. You can then review everything in one focused dashboard and clean up safely with Apple's native event editor.

Why users choose ClearDays:

-Detect calendar spam and scam invites fast
-Spot suspicious links and fake alert patterns
-Review flagged events in a clean, focused view
-Prioritize higher-risk events from subscribed calendars
-Keep control with user-confirmed cleanup steps

Built for privacy and control:

-On-device analysis for core spam detection
-No hidden background auto-deletion
-Lightweight utility focused on one job: calendar cleanup
-Optional one-time lifetime unlock, no subscription
If your calendar is filled with fake warnings, suspicious invites, or phishing-style events, ClearDays helps you clean it quickly and stay in control.
apps.shortDescription: ClearDays is a privacy-first calendar cleaner for iPhone that helps you detect calendar spam, scam invites, and suspicious event links before they waste your time.

apps.name: VoltDo: Energy To-Do List
apps.subtitle: Plan Tasks by Battery Level
apps.description:
VoltDo isn't just a to-do list. It's your personal energy manager.

Stop drowning in endless lists that only create stress. VoltDo helps you plan your tasks based on your current battery level.

WHY VOLTDO? Listen to your body. Work smart, not hard. Traditional planners ignore how you feel – VoltDo puts your well-being first. Perfect for avoiding burnout and managing ADHD.

KEY FEATURES:

 Energy Check Filter tasks by effort: "Light", "Medium", or "Heavy". Low on energy today? The app adapts and shows you quick wins.

 Focus Mode Overwhelmed? Only see what you can actually handle right now. Hide the clutter.

 Anti-Burnout The app actively warns you when you're overcommitting for the day.

 Smart Widgets See your energy status and next tasks directly on your Home Screen.

Download VoltDo now and find your flow.

===
Terms of Use: https://voltdo-terms.netlify.app
apps.shortDescription: VoltDo isn't just a to-do list.

apps.name: Verse – My Quotes
apps.subtitle: Save quotes. Read with focus.
apps.description:
Verse is a calm little space for the quotes and sentences you never want to lose. Instead of endless lists of random sayings, you only keep the words that truly matter to you – from books, movies, podcasts or real‑life conversations.
No account, no social feed, no distractions. Verse feels like a small paper notebook dedicated just to your quotes – always with you on your iPhone.

Why Verse?

-Your own quotes, not a random feed
Save the exact lines, phrases and thoughts you care about – with source, context and tags if you like.

-Everything stays on your device
Your quotes are yours. Verse stores them locally on your iPhone. No accounts, no tracking, no hidden data sharing.


-Capture a line in seconds
A sentence you hear on the train, a phrase from a podcast, a thought before sleep – open Verse, type, done. Perfect when a full journal feels like too much.


-Find quotes in seconds
Search your collection by words, people or topics. Even years later, you can instantly find that one line you almost forgot.


-Minimal, distraction‑free design
Verse is intentionally quiet: no likes, no comments, no noise. Just text – and you.

How people use Verse

-Save favorite quotes from books, films and talks

-Collect inspiring lines from sermons, lectures or podcasts

-Keep your own phrases, tweet ideas or lyrics in one place

-Store affirmations, reflections or learning notes


Always ready when you need it
Verse opens fast, works offline and keeps the interface simple on purpose. If you’ve ever wished for a tiny quote app instead of a heavy notes or journal app, this is it.
Start with a handful of quotes today – and watch your personal library of words grow over time.

===
Terms of Use: https://versequote.netlify.app/privacy.html
apps.shortDescription: Verse is a calm little space for the quotes and sentences you never want to lose.
